act_now.title: CONTRADICTION: Three Revenue Targets Active. Zig Tracking $1.39M. 7th Scan.
act_now.detail: Zig's June 29 Monday report: gap $902,756 + committed+quote $489,116 = ~$1.39M target. Jan's Confluence methodology says $1.5M by Aug 1. Steve's canonical is $1M by Sept 1. Three numbers, one revenue team. Zig's calculation proves he's running against ~$1.39M — not $1M. The team classifies deals differently depending on which number they think is real.
act_now.action: Post ONE message in #sales_revenue-ninjas: 'Canonical target is $1M ARR by Sept 1. Every deal classification, every forecast, every Monday update — flows from that.' Or confirm the real number.

act_now.title: Garland $140K — Close Date Pushed To July 31. Jodi Lever STILL Unpulled.
act_now.detail: Deal updated today (June 30). Close date moved from June 30 → July 31. Still at 'contractsent'. Still no evidence the Jodi Duron (Moak Casey) email to Dr. Rick Lopez was sent. The deadline slipped — but the single highest-leverage action in the pipeline (one DM, 30 seconds, $140K) sits untouched for two weeks. Michael Ruiz debrief happened in May. Jodi agreed to help. Nobody followed up.
act_now.action: DM Jodi Duron: 'Jodi — any update on the Dr. Lopez intro for Garland ISD? Close date is July 31 and I want to make sure we're positioned.' 30 seconds.

act_now.title: ESC-10 Proposal — 5 Days Overdue. ESC9 and ESC16 Are Firing. ESC-10 Is Silent.

ESC9 (Sunday McAdams, 7 replies) and ESC16 (Blakni Riley, 5 replies) are both actively coordinating district rosters for 26/27. ESC-10 is conspicuously silent. If it went out — kill this. If not — 5 days late against a consortium relationship while two other consortiums accelerate.
act_now.action: Confirm sent or send whatever exists today. Perfect is the enemy of sent.

act_now.title: $358 Closed Last Week. $0 Pipeline Generated. The Math Is Warning Loudly.
act_now.detail: Zig's June 29 report: last week closed $358. Previous week: $6,192. Pipeline generation: $0. With 11 weeks to Sept 1 and a $903K gap (by Zig's math), the pipeline isn't filling from behind. You can't close what you don't generate. Teela's 26-outbound blitz is the right motion — but it's motion, not a close engine yet. The July $266K wave needs arrivals behind it, and right now the pipeline is running on fumes.
act_now.action: Push Teela/Jan to convert meeting requests → booked demos this week. One metric: meetings held. Track it. Steve: pick three calls to make personally.
